title: Omnitrix Recalibrated: Totem of Undying
description: Transform your Totem of Undying into Ben 10's legendary Recalibrated Omnitrix with this pack.
body:
# **🟢 It's Hero Time! - Recalibrated Omnitrix Totem (Realistic Edition)**
![Recalibrated Omnitrix on your wrist!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53a2ce2db8cf578a1d0e8f8a5cb4d1075ece01bb_0.webp)

## **Upgrade your arsenal with the Recalibrated Omnitrix!**
This texture pack replaces the **Totem of Undying** in Minecraft 1.21.X with the legendary **Recalibrated Omnitrix** from **Ben 10: Alien Force**. This "Realistic Version" features high-quality textures and a 3D model positioned to look exactly like it’s wrapped around your wrist. 

> **Note:** While you can't turn into Swampfire or Humungousaur (yet!), you'll definitely look like the protector of Earth while facing danger!

---

## **🔄 Versions & Compatibility**
Please download the version that matches your Minecraft skin's arm width:

* **v1.1 (Slim Version):** Optimized for **Alex**-style skins (3-pixel wide arms).
* **v1.1.0 (Classic Version):** Optimized for **Steve**-style skins (4-pixel wide arms).

---

### **🛠️ Features**
* **Realistic 3D Model:** High-detail design based on the Alien Force era.
* **Wrist-Mounted:** Specifically modeled to align with your character's arm for maximum immersion.
* **Purely Aesthetic:** Keeps the standard Totem of Undying mechanics—completely survival and server friendly.

### **🚀 How to Install**
1.  Ensure you are using Minecraft **1.21** or higher.
2.  Check your skin type and download the corresponding file (**v1.1** for Slim or **v1.1.0** for Classic).
3.  Move the `.zip` file to your `resourcepacks` folder (`%appdata%/.minecraft/resourcepacks`).
4.  Activate the pack in the Resource Packs menu in-game.
5.  Equip the **Totem of Undying** in your off-hand and you're ready to go!

**Take your survival world to the next level and show off the power of the Recalibrated Omnitrix! 🟢⌚**

---
**PD:** This is the realistic version.
